factory_methods.name: initializeProxy(address,bool)
factory_methods.rationale: Canonical 2-arg initializeProxy form sourced from cow-sdk TS ABI (L1 authority). The 1-arg source-HEAD form is NOT vendored because the deployed bytecode targets the 2-arg selector.

factory_methods.name: executeHooks((address,uint256,bytes,bool,bool)[],bytes32,uint256,address,bytes)
factory_methods.rationale: Primary hook-execution entry point for relayed batches

factory_methods.name: executePreSignedHooks((address,uint256,bytes,bool,bool)[],bytes32,uint256,address)
factory_methods.rationale: Pre-signed hook-execution entry point indexed by struct hash without domain prefix

type_hashes.name: CALL_TYPE_HASH
type_hashes.type_string: Call(address target,uint256 value,bytes callData,bool allowFailure,bool isDelegateCall)
type_hashes.rationale: EIP-712 type hash for the COW Shed Call struct (no whitespace between commas in declaration order)

type_hashes.name: EXECUTE_HOOKS_TYPE_HASH
type_hashes.type_string: ExecuteHooks(Call[] calls,bytes32 nonce,uint256 deadline)Call(address target,uint256 value,bytes callData,bool allowFailure,bool isDelegateCall)
type_hashes.rationale: EIP-712 type hash for the COW Shed ExecuteHooks struct, with the nested Call type string appended

type_hashes.name: EIP712_DOMAIN_TYPE_HASH
type_hashes.rationale: Standard EIP-712 domain type hash used by every chain's per-proxy domain separator

signature_byte_order.rationale: COW Shed signed-hook signature carries r-then-s-then-v (not the standard v-then-r-then-s); enforced at the type level by a trybuild fixture in the cow-sdk-cow-shed body landing
